case_title: ANTONINI PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION VS VENNER DANIEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANTONINI PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VENNER DANIEL BY VIRTUE FO CCP 431.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VENNER DANIEL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ANTONINI PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
